title: WARNING: ESG Funds Cost 5 to 15X MORE in Fees #shorts
description:
You'll Be Shocked: Do ESG Funds REALLY Lower Returns Due to Fees?

Meir Statman, professor of finance at Santa Clara University in California concluded the same thing – that socially responsible funds tend to have higher annual fees, so their returns are likely to lag behind over time.
 
The WallStreet Journal also found that managed ESG funds cost 5 to 15 times as much in fees when compared to an index fund.

This is a huge issue – and one more 401k investors need to be aware of …because fees eat away over time at our retirement savings, which can impact retirement income. 

It doesn’t matter if we’re talking ESG funds or Target date funds, investors need to know how much they’re paying in fees. Period. 

#shorts #esg #esginvesting #401k #401kfees
